## Source: ghsa-malware (bd8e9accf31f14b7db4c4dc18ad301c215682447b72f4bb86a1af326ec51ad54)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (379fca058a380a033332183e2ff704c2c9364d08fc8d550eb7a1f5171bc9221f)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'aqueduct-client' @ 1.3.3 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
